facts.title: No server involved
facts.detail: This JSON travelled from a .cap zip, through the Cache API, out of a service worker fetch handler.

facts.title: Verified before serving
facts.detail: Every byte of this package matched its SHA-256 checksum in security.json before the reactor would serve a single route.

facts.title: Contract, not framework
facts.detail: routes.json and storage.json are the whole API contract — any Capsium reactor (Ruby, Lua, JS) serves this dataset identically.
